app.title: Show HN: Honker – Postgres NOTIFY/LISTEN Semantics for SQLite
app.author: russellthehippo
app.description: Add PostgreSQL's LISTEN/NOTIFY semantics to SQLite
proposed_tests: Install Honker and run a NOTIFY/NOTIFY test
